DECLARATION OF SUPPLEMENTAL ROBERT S ARNS IN SUPPORT OF PLTFS OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALENCIA, FRANCISCO VALENCIA, ALEJANDRA

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. DEFENDANT BNBT BUILDERS, INC DBA BNBUILDERS'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE IN LIGHT OF THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE. DEFENDANT IS SEEKING TO FILE A PERMISSIVE CROSS-COMPLAINT, NOT A COMPULSORY ONE. SEE CCP 426.30; CCP 428.10. THEREFORE, SILVER ORGS. V. FRANK (1990) 217 CAL.APP.3D 94 DOES NOT APPLY TO THIS MOTION. GRANTING LEAVE TO FILE THE CROSS-COMPLAINT WOULD PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT CAN FILE AN INDEPENDENT ACTION FOR INDEMNITY AGAINST CONCO. (EMAILED ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders Complaint in Intervention dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File X-Complt
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT BNBT BUILDERS, INC DBA BNBUILDERS'S Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint is denied without prejudice in light of the current trial date. Defendant is seeking to file a permissive cross-complaint, not a compulsory one. See CCP 426.30; CCP 428.10. Therefore, Silver Orgs. v. Frank (1990) 217 Cal.App.3d 94 does not apply to this motion. Granting leave to file the cross-complaint would prejudice plaintiff. Defendant can file an independent action for indemnity against Conco. (Emailed order signed after hearing.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Set For Trial On Jun-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
